commit.subject: LU-XXXX obdclass: local storage rmdir is broken
commit.message:
LU-XXXX obdclass: local storage rmdir is broken

When removing a subdirectory, nlink should be
dropped for the parent directory. Otherwise,
e2fsck complains about broken link count.

Change-Id: I8d97e8c2f2ace66a2104a7aaf3fabb1636735184
Signed-off-by: Andrew Perepechko <andrew.perepechko@hpe.com>
HPE-bug-id: LUS-9719
